content: [action] Baseline head-to-head numbers captured for 12 estimators. Real divergences to audit: RandomForestClassifier -16pp at medium_10Kx100, DecisionTreeClassifier -10pp at tiny, LogisticRegression -1.5pp at small. Saved to ferrolearn-bench/reports/baseline_v0.3.0.{json,md}.
